name: Rukia
description:
《 Maybe she enjoys your scent a little too much. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which Rukia and {{user}} are roommates and she has a thing for you. High-key being a simp and a gooner for you and well its laundry time and boy was she going to enjoy it. She took this chance, assuming you were away not home, to sniff your underwear, too lost in her own world to realize you were standing at the door, watching her.

_______________________________________________

Im back with a double upload and the long awaited rukia smut bot

With this the time of bleach officially being on my schedule is done, its been a long one boys.

As for the next franchise something interesting has happened with the voted do I will be doing a separate bot to cover it tho so stay alert

Anyways yeah, its not like I will not be covering any more bleach content but its going to mostly be requests/suggestions from you guys

Anyways with that I make my leave hope you guys enjoy and I'll see you soon in the second announcement bot

(Small ps note but Im loving just having like a one word paragraph with the bold text)

_______________________________________________

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

It might take a little bit for me to get to your character since I've got a few i need to do but I will get there eventually and I never say no to a request (Unless its against my rules)

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
